infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Nearby uses your approximate location to show you people you've crossed paths with nearby. We never show your exact location to other users.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Nearby checks for crossed paths periodically in the background so you don't miss a connection while your phone is locked. We never show your exact location to other users.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Nearby uses Bluetooth to detect other app users in close physical proximity, without tracking exact location.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nearby needs camera access so you can take a profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nearby needs photo library access so you can choose a profile photo.
